item.title: There's a Hut on the Side of the Matterhorn
item.description:
There really is, Built in 1917, for use in emergencies: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solvay_Hut
Doesn't look real.
There's apparently a telephone line. Not a lot of other amenities.
One of the few wooden structures on earth located above the clouds.
Watch your step
It has quite a view
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Red is Rad, blue is bad
item.description: Edit of edit: holy smokes you guys are amazing! Thank you so much for the encouragement and kind words. Edit! Today I learned: badonkadonk usually refers to booty. I have used it more for my boobs than butt. Sorry about the confusion Not gonna lie, my badonkadonks are my favorite feature of myself. I don't mind watching my muffin top hips reduce in ... hang over ... But I don't really want to lose my magnificent mammaries. It started by my bras feeling differently. Now my over the shoulder boulder holders have undesired gap-page. Not your usual happy go weight loss story, but that's what I've got going on. Anyway! Happy holidays everyone!!!
item.dc:creator: HavocWraith

item.description: Hello MV! Dm stuff that makes you happy
item.dc:creator: Alivewiththwgloryoflove

item.title: Montreal, Quebec, December 6, 1989
item.description: A hate-filled man entered a college and started shooting. He murdered 14 and wounded 14 more. All were women. He specifically divided the students by gender and shot the women. Across Canada, the massacre had a profound effect, resulting in tighter gun laws, laws and policies targeting violence against women, and more. It is still remembered and commemorated to this day.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: A favorite for my Cakeday: Binturong play session
item.description: Decided to share this video for my Cakeday. It's been a while since I've seen it posted on Imgur. Enjoy! ............. Binturongs are also known as Asian bearcats and Malay civet cats. These bearcats generally sleep during the day high in the forest canopy and love to bask in the sun. Binturongs are primarily nocturnal and move slowly through their home in the trees to look for fruit. - San Diego Zoo For more information: https://animals.sandiegozoo.org/animals/binturong

item.title: Trump Dictatorship and World Holocaust
item.description:
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/dec/06/donald-trump-sean-hannity-dictator-day-one-response-iowa-town-hall In a Republican Townhall, Trump bragged about becoming a dictator on day one to the applause of the MAGAt cult.
https://www.snopes.com/fact-check/trump-truth-social-dictatorship/ https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2023/12/04/trump-dictatorship-authoritarian-election-2024/ He also shared his support of an article that showed how him becoming a dictator would be likely.
https://www.businessinsider.com/if-donald-trump-dies-presidential-election-republican-candidates-2023-11 His dictatorship would mean the end of Democracy. We need him behind bars, off the ballot, if we can be so lucky unalived through natural or semi-natural causes.
A Trump dictatorship would mean the genocide of people of color as a racist police state will be given full power and immunity to gun down minority communities.
A Trump dictatorship would mean the genocide of Palestine in support of fascist colonial regimes and white supremacy.
A Trump dictatorship would mean the genocide of trans kids denied lifesaving care and the return of conversion therapy and lynchings of LGBTQ+ as a theocracy is installed.
Under a Trump dictatorship, women will become property again with no rights to vote, hold property, or sayin ome what happens to their own bodies under a christofascist theocracy.
Democracy will be overthrown with the full support of MAGAT domestic terrorism supporting the creation of a gestapo secret police, locking up political opponents, and MAGATs in the community tipping off the gestapo to arrest friends and family. You will not be allowed to speak, think, or breathe without an armed raid on your door. This is what fascism looks like. We must resist by any means necessary.
item.dc:creator: XavieColorQueen

item.dc:creator: justasimpleinternetfarmer

item.title: Sometimes I Hate Phone Screen Interviews
item.description: I feel like my answer is never the right answer. I don't want to say a number too high and automatically price myself out of consideration. On the other hand, I don't want to low-ball myself and have them accept me at less than they were willing to offer. They didn't list a salary range with the job posting, so I gave them my current salary with a 10% increase. Screaming into the job search void. Again. EDIT: Holy shit this blew up! Thank you all for your advice. I told them what I'm currently making and said I was looking for "at least" 15% on top of my current wages, citing the commute (they're further away and right on the fringes of what I'd consider a daily reasonable drive). I'll keep you all posted on any future success/failure. Keep fighting the good fight, imgurians. Once more unto the breach, dear friends!
item.dc:creator: MagmaCarta

item.title: Metal Mice Armor | Jeff De Boer
item.description: Artist, blacksmith, and Canadian Jeff De Boer of Calgary, Alberta makes minuscule museum-quality suits of armor… for mice. Though not pictured, he also makes armor for cats.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs
